seo.title: Diagnostic Centre in Indiranagar, Bangalore
seo.description: Cadabam's Diagnostics in Indiranagar offers accurate lab tests, 3T MRI, CT, ultrasound and health checkups with NABL-certified labs. Reports in 6 hours and home sample collection across Bangalore.

center.markdown:
Welcome to Cadabam’s Diagnostics, Indiranagar—your trusted hub for accurate and compassionate diagnostic care. Conveniently located for easy access, our Indiranagar branch is part of a wider network across Bangalore, including centres in Banashankari, Kalyan Nagar, Jayanagar, and Kanakapura Road.  

Each location is equipped with advanced technology and staffed by skilled professionals, all dedicated to supporting your health journey with precision and care. Wherever you are in the city, Cadabam’s Diagnostics ensures quality diagnostics are always close by. 

Unmatched Diagnostic Services 

Cadabam’s Diagnostics brings a broad range of high-quality diagnostic services designed for comprehensive care, including: - 

Precision 3T MRI imaging 

Advanced multi-slice CT scans 

Extensive ultrasound options, including 3D/4D fetal imaging 

Targeted elastography for liver, breast, and prostate assessments 

Full laboratory capabilities, offering: 

X-rays and mammography 

Bone density measurement (BMD) 

Fertility-focused HSG testing 

And an array of other essential health tests 

Your Partner in Preventive Health 

At Cadabam’s, we believe diagnostics are just the beginning. With a focus on early detection and preventive strategies, we’re here to support your journey to optimal health—every step of the way.
